title: Financial Econometrics

prerequisites.text: Acceptance into Master's programs in Statistics & Data Science or Data Science, and/or statistical background deemed sufficient by the Head of Department.

outline: This course examines from an advanced econometric and quantitative perspective: market efficiency in macro-economic markets including the JSE, bond market and short-term interest rate markets; characteristics of the JSE and its sectors; appropriate return transformations; company specific, sector specific and market wide effects; special focus on the R$ exchange rate and its effect on local markets; technical modelling of bond market (Nelson-Siegel parameterisation) and the share market (Black Scholes; derivatives).
assessment: Assignment 30%. Examination, 3 hours, 70%. A subminimum of 40% in each of the assignment and examination components.
